title: Funding available for health care projects - Canada.ca
content:
## Funding available for health care projects
Funding programs, grants and contribution funding opportunities that maintain and improve Canada's health care system.

## Services and information

### Health Care Policy and Strategies Program
Funding and evaluation of the Health Care Policy and Strategies Program.

### Official Language Health Program
Submit a proposal for funding of official language communities.

### Funding opportunities
Grant and contribution funding opportunities.

### Sexual and Reproductive Health Fund
The Sexual and Reproductive Health Fund aims to strengthen the healthcare system and related supports for under-served community members.
